steps.title: Isolate y to convert to slope-intercept form
steps.content:
Starting with $48x - 6y = -32$, move the $x$-term to the right:
$$-6y = -48x - 32$$
Divide both sides by $-6$:
$$y = \frac{-48x - 32}{-6}$$
Separate the fraction and simplify:
$$y = \frac{-48x}{-6} + \frac{-32}{-6} = 8x + \frac{16}{3}$$

steps.title: Read the slope from the equation
steps.content: In slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$, the slope is the coefficient of $x$. Our equation is $y = 8x + \frac{16}{3}$, so the slope is \$8$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
